name: effective_date
label: Effective Date
hint: Select agreement effective date

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where agreement is signed

name: agreement_context
label: Agreement Context
hint: Select context of non-compete

name: restricted_party_name
label: Restricted Party Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: restricted_party_address
label: Restricted Party Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: restricted_party_type
label: Restricted Party Type
hint: Select type

name: restricted_party_authorized_signatory_name
label: Restricted Party Authorized Signatory Name
hint: Enter authorized signatory name

name: restricted_party_authorized_signatory_designation
label: Restricted Party Authorized Signatory Designation
hint: Enter designation, e.g. Director, CEO, Partner

name: beneficiary_party_name
label: Beneficiary Party Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: beneficiary_party_address
label: Beneficiary Party Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: beneficiary_party_type
label: Beneficiary Party Type
hint: Select type

name: beneficiary_party_authorized_signatory_name
label: Beneficiary Party Authorized Signatory Name
hint: Enter authorized signatory name

name: beneficiary_party_authorized_signatory_designation
label: Beneficiary Party Authorized Signatory Designation
hint: Enter designation, e.g. Director, CEO, Partner

name: business_description
label: Business Description
hint: Describe nature of business being protected

name: employee_id_or_role
label: Employee ID / Role
hint: Enter employee ID, designation, or role tied to the restriction

name: post_termination_obligations
label: Post-Termination Obligations
hint: Specify return of company property, data, devices, access cards, and related obligations

name: goodwill_valuation
label: Goodwill Valuation
hint: Enter goodwill or business value relevant to the sale transaction

name: transaction_reference
label: Transaction Reference
hint: Reference the main sale agreement, asset purchase agreement, or transaction document

name: restricted_activities
label: Restricted Activities
hint: Clearly list prohibited activities

name: restricted_industry
label: Restricted Industry
hint: Specify industry or sector

name: restricted_territory
label: Restricted Territory
hint: Select the geographic scope of the restriction

name: restricted_territory_details
label: Restricted Territory Details
hint: Describe the exact city, state, country, office, or market covered

name: radius_kilometers
label: Radius / Kilometers
hint: Enter the distance from a specified office or location

name: restriction_period_months
label: Restriction Period (Months)
hint: Enter duration of restriction

name: start_trigger
label: Restriction Start Trigger
hint: When does restriction begin?

name: consideration_provided
label: Consideration Provided
hint: Is compensation provided for non-compete?

name: consideration_details
label: Consideration Details
hint: Describe compensation, benefit, or payout supporting the restriction

name: payment_mode
label: Payment Mode
hint: Select how consideration will be paid

name: tax_identification_number
label: Tax Identification Number
hint: Enter PAN, EIN, GSTIN, or other tax number for withholding/compliance

name: include_non_solicitation
label: Include Non-Solicitation
hint: Tick if client, customer, employee, or vendor solicitation should also be restricted

name: non_solicitation_details
label: Non-Solicitation Details
hint: Describe who cannot be solicited, for how long, and under what exceptions

name: confidentiality_clause
label: Confidentiality Clause
hint: Confidentiality obligations

name: exceptions
label: Exceptions
hint: List permitted activities or exceptions

name: penalty_clause
label: Penalty Clause
hint: Penalty in case of breach

name: indemnification_clause
label: Indemnification Clause
hint: State whether the restricted party must cover losses, legal costs, or damages caused by breach

name: remedies_clause
label: Remedies Clause
hint: Legal remedies (injunction, damages)

name: severability_clause
label: Severability Clause
hint: Invalid clauses do not affect rest

name: termination_clause
label: Termination Clause
hint: Conditions under which agreement ends

name: notice_period_days
label: Notice Period (Days)
hint: Enter notice period for termination where relevant outside employment contracts

name: survival_clause
label: Survival Clause
hint: Specify which obligations survive the restriction period, such as confidentiality, indemnity, notice, or dispute resolution

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Enter applicable law (e.g., Laws of India)

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction

name: include_review_sign_details
label: Review & Sign Details
hint: Tick when you are ready to capture execution details like witness information
